build.buildCommand:
npm install && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const exclude=['invoices-tools','store-tools','products-tools','payments-tools','location-tools','social-media-tools','survey-tools','blog-tools'];const serverFiles=['src/server.ts','src/http-server.ts'];serverFiles.forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f))return;let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const lines=c.split('
');const filtered=lines.filter(line=>{const lower=line.toLowerCase();return!exclude.some(ex=>lower.includes(ex.replace('-','_'))||lower.includes(ex)||lower.includes(ex.replace('-tools','')));});fs.writeFileSync(f,filtered.join('
'));console.log('Patched '+f+': removed '+(lines.length-filtered.length)+' lines');});exclude.forEach(ex=>{const toolsDir='src/tools';if(fs.existsSync(toolsDir)){fs.readdirSync(toolsDir).forEach(file=>{const lower=file.toLowerCase().replace(/-/g,'').replace(/_/g,'');const match=exclude.some(e=>lower.includes(e.replace(/-/g,'')));if(match){const p=path.join(toolsDir,file);fs.writeFileSync(p,'// EXCLUDED
export function registerTools(){};
export default {};');console.log('Gutted '+p);}});}});console.log('Patch complete');" && npm run build
